//BUS_node1_sender_serial

=== BUS Topology System ===
# connected_node=1, role=sender, target=5
# direct logical CAN delivery; no visible forwarding logs
# hidden_nodes=2,3,4 are not connected to PC; hidden errors are inferred from missing/delayed receiver logs
